abilities.name: Crumbling Apart
abilities.text: This model cannot be healed by other models. When this model suffers damage, the damage this model suffers is changed to 1 irreducible damage.

abilities.name: Intense Heat
abilities.text: Enemy models with a Burning token that activate within 8" of this model are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Flaming Club
actions.effects: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Up in Flames
triggers.text: Remove all Scheme markers within (pulse)2 of the target.

actions.name: Breath of Fire
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Raining Cinders
triggers.text: When resolving, deal this action's damage to up to two different models within 2" of the target instead of one.

triggers.name: Ancestral Curse
triggers.text: The target gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Kiln-Baked
actions.effects: Remove all Burning tokens from models within (pulse)2" of this model. This model heals 1 for each token removed (to a maximum of 2).

triggers.name: Thermal Shock
triggers.text: Enemy models within (pulse)2" of this model must pass a TN 12 Df duel or they are dealt 1 damage and gain a Burning token.
